messages.content:
inform her about Q2 2024 we plan to return the additional fund to DF so to keep DC intercompany fund at minimal.

Please rewrite above politely

In light of our planning for Q2 2024, we aim to ensure efficient financial management by returning the surplus funds to DF. This initiative is part of our strategy to maintain a minimal balance in the DC intercompany fund. We believe this move will contribute to our broader financial optimization efforts. Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Hi, following our discussion in earlier meeting, believe we are all on the same page that of accounting standard and MAS concern in relation to sub-lease of office, whereby leasing accounting is accounted, and additional remarks are brought up to MAS attention accordingly. 

In the meantime, we aim to maintain a minimal balance in the DCSMG interco fund with holding company - DFHSG. Therefore, we will be returning the surplus funds to DFHSG.

Please rewrite politely and end with a perfect closing sentence.

Following our recent meeting, it's clear that we share a mutual understanding regarding the accounting standards and the Monetary Authority of Singapore's (MAS) considerations related to the sub-lease of office space, specifically how leasing accounting is conducted. Additionally, we've agreed to address and bring any further remarks to the attention of MAS as required.

In alignment with this understanding and our ongoing efforts to maintain efficient financial management, we are committed to keeping a minimal balance in the DCSMG intercompany fund with our holding company, DFHSG. To this end, we plan to return the surplus funds back to DFHSG.

We appreciate your cooperation and understanding as we continue to navigate these matters with diligence and adherence to regulatory standards. Thank you for your continued partnership.

Warm regards,

Following our recent meeting, believe that we share the same page that of accounting standards and MAS considerations in relation to the sub-lease of office space, whereby leasing accounting is conducted. Additionally, we’ve agreed to address and bring any further remarks to the attention of MAS as required.



In the meantime, we aim to maintain a minimal balance in the DC interco fund. To this end, we have returned the surplus funds back to DF.

Please rewrite in short and proper

Following our recent discussion, we align on the adherence to accounting standards and the considerations required by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) regarding the sub-leasing of office space. We have agreed to promptly address and report any additional observations to MAS as necessary.

Concurrently, in our effort to maintain a minimal balance in the DC intercompany fund, we have taken the step to return the surplus funds to DF.

leasing accounting is conducted.

please rewrite
Accounting for leasing is carried out.
again
Lease accounting is performed.
again
Leasing transactions are accounted for.
again please more casual
We do the accounting for leases.
again
We handle the books for leasing.

leasing accounting is....

please fill in the blank, whole sentence should be leasing transaction is accounted
Leasing transaction is accounted for.
again
Leasing transaction is accounted for in the records.
